title: Wire entry/exit/resolution code paths to populate attribution fields; backfill existing trades
acceptance:
- A new paper trade exercised end-to-end writes non-NULL values for all attribution columns at the appropriate lifecycle point
- Resolution correctly populates trade_class per enum rules
- Backfill script is idempotent and distinguishes reliable (attribution_version=1) from best-effort (attribution_version=0)
- No change in entry/exit decision behavior
- No files outside allowed_files modified
